title: {{NAME}} — Architecture
ssot_note: JSON=SSOT (AI/tool parse); humans view architecture.html via `python3 serve.py`. Update in-place (not append). History/decisions/dates → CHANGELOG.md + git (never in tree). Hierarchy decomposes via `children` (commons single-doc); one fact per node, deeper detail → child nodes.

children.role: (what this campaign covers — the system, not a single instance; the reference fields it draws on)
(the one-line reframing this repo argues — a floor/ceiling reopened, a problem recast as engineering-and-volume rather than a fixed wall).
(the central falsifiable claim, with the expected direction/magnitude)
(the design stack — each child a layer/module of the system, from base unit up to whole-system scope).
(first layer — the atomic/material/base unit the rest composes from)
(how inputs move through the components to outputs — the end-to-end pipeline).
Hypothesis-verification system: pre-register → falsify → run → verdict. Flat registry + one rich card per hypothesis; shared deterministic harness in repo-root tool/.
HYPOTHESES/ — REGISTRY.jsonl (one JSON line per hypothesis) + cards/H_*.md (frozen pre-register + ≥5 falsifiers) + cards/_TEMPLATE.md skeleton.
tool/{{SLUG_SNAKE}}.py — stdlib-only closed-form primitives + Falsifier/evaluate ledger. Per-hypothesis runs + result.json live under state/<hX>/.
